creator: sjr@home.net
text:
There is a problem with the 3C509 recognition and the fix
	that is repeated in the mailing lists is to change ELINK_ID_PORT
	from 0x100 to 0x110 in /usr/src/sys/i386/isa/elink.h.

Fix: 

Change constant as stated above. I'm not sure this is the
	correct fix, but this is what is repeatly suggested and allows
	these cards to be recognized.
